hero.title: Fertilizer Recipe
hero.subtitle: Analysis-based nutrition program tailored to crop stage. Every manat of fertilizer works.

methodology.title: Methodology
items: Water, substrate, and drainage analysis review
Nutrient balance by crop stage (vegetative/generative transition, fruit load, stabilization)
EC/pH targets — day/night, adjusted by radiation level
A/B tank recipes — ready for practical preparation

result.title: Deliverable
result.text: Written recipe + application schedule + next analysis date.

inquiry.title: Tailored to your site
inquiry.text: We prepare an individual quote based on your area, season stage, and goals.
